title: citrus semperflorens
intro: Citrus semperflorens, also known as the 'Everbearing Lemon', is a species of citrus plant that is known for its evergreen foliage and year-round fruit production. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of limonene and other citrus oils. The health benefits of Citrus semperflorens include its ability to aid in digestion, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Citrus semperflorens can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including tea, essential oil, and dried fruit powder, which can be used to promote overall well-being and health.
